title: sambucus racemosa f. plumosa
intro: Sambucus racemosa f. plumosa is a variant of the American elderberry plant, characterized by its plumose (or feathery) inflorescences. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds and flu due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa f. plumosa include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. This plant can be prepared as a tea, syrup, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
